title: grammica stenolepis
intro: Grammica stenolepis is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Grammica stenolepis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
